Shop your groceries at Pacific Werribee

Find the freshest ingredients
Shop at our fresh food retailers who provide a variety of international, fresh, quality ingredients for your next family feast.
Aldi
Prices you'll love talking about.
SHOP NOW
Bakers Delight
Every day in our bakeries, Bakers Delight bakers hand craft traditional and gourmet breads using real ingredients, real bakers and real ovens.
SHOP NOW
Best Bazaar
Shop the finest range of Indian groceries at Best Bazaar. Discover fresh produce, spices, snacks, and essentials to bring authentic Indian flavours to your home.
SHOP NOW
Breadtop
A bakery full of goodies, savoury, sweets, cakes and more!
SHOP NOW
Coles
You’ll find there’s a lot more to Coles than just our excellent quality and value!
SHOP NOW
Ferguson Plarre’s Bakehouse
Shop incredible offers across fashion, homewares, beauty and more!
SHOP NOW
Fish Pier
enjoy fresh fish from an experienced team ready to share their expert advice. If you're looking for whole fish to wow a dinner party, ready and easy cooking, or prawns for the summer BBQ, Fish Pier has all that and more.
SHOP NOW
Global Meats & Groceries
Global Meats & Groceries is a one Stop Bangladeshi Supermarket - Meats, chicken, groceries and more.
SHOP NOW
Gramazio Fine Cuts
Grill'd offers a range of fresh, healthy flame grilled burgers that are made from the highest quality, freshest ingredients – ideal for those who enjoy eating.
SHOP NOW
Pacific Asian Supermarket
Find authentic ingredients at your favourite Asian grocer!
SHOP NOW
Woolworths
Providing customers with the widest range of quality products and are constantly looking for new ways to offer greater choice.
SHOP NOW

I agree to the privacy policy and wish to receive Pacific Werribee's newsletter containing the latest news and offers.

We acknowledge and respect the traditional lands and cultures of the Bunurong people of the Kulin Nation, the Traditional Owners and Custodians of the Country on which Pacific Werribee resides, and pay our respects to Elders past and present. We recognise First Nations peoples’ longstanding and ongoing spiritual connections to land, sea, community, and country.
